desc: A rare rainbow fish that has never been caught by mortal man.
An autonomous monkey type robot which was developed with cutting-edge technology. It moves very acrobatically.
He seems to be very unreliable, but he might have incredible potential.
''Alpha, Beta, and Gamma meld as one to form a powerful monster.''
On land or in the sea, the speed of this monster is unmatchable.
A fallen fairy that is powerful in the dark.
This elf is rumored to have lived for thousands of years. He leads an army of spirits against his enemies.
Before the dawn of man, this lizard warrior ruled supreme.
This creature adopts the form of a white goat living in the forest, but is actually a Forest Elder.
A silent and deadly warrior specializing in assassinations.
A wizard of the waters that conjures a liquid wall to crush any enemies that oppose him.
An air marmot that has a nefarious horn and wings. It attacks by throwing acorns.
An expert at battle who belongs to a crack diabolical unit. He's famous because he always gets the job done.
A strange warrior who manipulates three deadly blades with both hands and his tail.
A lizard with a very tough hide and a vicious bite.
A bluish starfish with a solid hide capable of fending off attacks.
This warrior blindly swings a deadly blade with devastating force.
An axe-wielding monster of tremendous strength and agility.
Much more than just a child, this dragon is gifted with untapped power.
An aristocrat who wields a sword possessed by a malicious spirit that preys on the weak.
Usually found traveling in swarms, this creature's ideal environment is the forest.
A cyborg with high defense power. Originally it was invented for a football machine.
A monster with tremendous power, it destroys enemies with a swing of its axe.
A bull monster often found in the woods, it charges enemy monsters with a pair of deadly horns.
A plant-warrior that attacks with seeds and sword.

Only the master of the sword among Fiend-Type monsters is permitted to hold the Talwar.


(This card is always treated as an "Archfiend" card.)
A vicious creature that has decapitated numerous enemy monsters.
What this creature lacks in size it makes up for in defense when battling in the prairie.
With an enormous maw and massive teeth, this monstrosity is one dangerous and strange serpent from the deep.
''Alpha, Beta, and Gamma meld as one to form a powerful monster.''
A species of huge Des Koala. He's meek, but people are afraid of him because he's very powerful.
A mysterious priest created as a result of the latest advances in biotechnology.
A dragon that dwells in the depths of darkness, its vulnerability lies in its poor eyesight.
An image of beauty on the ice, this gorgeous warrior rips her opponents into pieces with her stylish Accel Slicer attack.
A wicked wooden spirit now burning in flames. Its fire attack is powerful, but it will soon be nothing but ashes.
Constructed from several components, this monster can launch them in a pincer attack.
This legendary dragon is a powerful engine of destruction. Virtually invincible, very few have faced this awesome creature and lived to tell the tale.
With hair shaped like a crown and a body encased in bluish white flames, this bird is a formidable sight.
A freight car that is exclusively for Dekoichi. It can transport anything, but most cargo arrives broken.
This monster wanders the seas, sucking dry any creatures it may encounter.
This is one sea creature whose wrath is something monsters fear to face.
A sly rat. He will come at you with his huge left claw.
An elf who learned to wield a sword, he baffles enemies with lightning-swift attacks.
A wicked wooden spirit that has burned out. The barbecue grilled with this charcoal is so awesome that everybody thinks it's priceless.
A fiery mouse, travelling the world to become the strongest fighter in the world of mice. Be careful not to touch him, or you will get burned.
Stretching arms and razor-sharp claws make this monster a formidable opponent.
A clown revived by the powers of darkness. Its deadly dance has sent many monsters to their graves.
A zombie shark that can deliver its lethal curse with a spell.
Queen of the galaxies and mistress of the stars.
This weakened dragon can no longer fly, but is still a deadly force to be reckoned with.
A powerful dragon with teeth that can grind almost anything to dust.
A wicked dragon that taps into dark forces to execute a powerful attack.
A jet-powered hawk that travels at the speed of sound.
A mechanical soldier that won't stop attacking until all life readings have been extinguished from its sensors.
The most lovable and friendly of all the Vehicroids. It can arm itself with training wheels!
Gifted with the power of dragons, this warrior wields a sword created from a dragon's fang.
A poor goblin that was sucked into a different dimension. However, he's doing his best with his new destiny.
An elf that dances across the sky with wings of razor-sharp blades.
Armed with the Psycho Sword, this sinister assassin rules the bad land.
Bats from the netherworld that use their hyper senses to detect their enemies.
They say he is a dragon-manipulating warrior from the dark world. His attack is tremendous, using his great swords with vicious power.
Entirely gray, this beast has rarely been seen by mortal eyes.
It's said that this King of the Netherworld once had the power to rule over the dark.
''The ultimate wizard in terms of attack and defense.''
A fiend said to dwell in the world of dreams, it attacks enemies in their sleep.
A popular creature in mythology that delivers fatal attacks with a sharp spear.
An explosive expert from a special elite force.
A warrior who gained immeasurable power from the heart of a volcano.
A thorny plant found in the darklands that wraps itself around any unwary traveler.
A golem with a massive right hand for crushing its victims.
A monstrous creature whose body is lined with cannons that never miss their targets.
This beast coils like a snake, and strikes quickly with its snapping beak.
This monster hides in a saucer and only appears when executing an attack.
A monster born in the lava pits, it generates intense heat that can melt away its enemies.
A legendary dragon sent by the gods as their instrument. Legends say that if provoked, the whole world will sink beneath the sea.
A boomerang with brains that will pursue a target to the ends of the earth.
This fairy rules over the end of existence.
A dragon revived by sorcery. Its breath is highly corrosive.
A blood-sucking snake in human form that attacks any living being that passes nearby.
Even when all odds are against this brave fairy, she will press onwards in battle and never retreat.
Hidden under the floors of a labyrinth, it swallows any who pass above.
A vengeful creature formed by the spirits of fallen warriors, it drags any who dare approach it into the deepest bowels of the earth.
A winged Elemental HERO who wheels through the sky and manipulates the wind. His signature move, Featherbreak, gives villainy a blow from sky-high.
A flame manipulator who was the first Elemental HERO woman. Her Burstfire burns away villainy.
An Elemental HERO with a clay body built-to-last. He'll preserve his Elemental HERO colleagues at any cost.
''A new Elemental HERO has arrived from Neo-Space! When he initiates a Contact Fusion with a Neo-Spacian his unknown powers are unleashed.''
''An Elemental HERO and a warrior of light who proficiently wields many kinds of armaments. His Static Shockwave cuts off the path of villainy.''
Queen of an army of giant mantises whose command moves legions.
A beautiful mermaid that lures voyagers to a watery grave.
This flying monster is known for delivering happiness to all.
This long-tailed bird blinds its enemies with mystical light.
A playful little fiend that lurks in the dark, waiting to attack an unwary enemy.
A bird-beast that summons reinforcements with a hand mirror.
A huge scorpion inhabited by the soul of a fiend. Usually it holds back, but has untapped potential.
A squid that thrives on fire and heat.
A fire-breathing plant found growing near volcanoes.
A malevolent creature wrapped in flames that attacks enemies with intense fire.
Known to many as the "Burning Executioner", this monster is capable of burning enemies to cinders.
A warrior protected by a flaming shield that nullifies any attack.
This monster moves while swinging its burning rope.
This Spellcaster attacks enemies with fire-related spells such as "Sea of Flames" and "Wall of Fire".
A fire-breathing snake whose speed makes it a difficult target.
Three wishes are granted to those fortunate enough to see this monster in flight.
A flying mantis that feeds primarily on insects.
A very rare penguin that takes to the air with ears shaped like wings.
A savage beast that carries a big bamboo stick for beating down its enemies.
A rust-free machine warrior born to battle.
This young evildoer used to have an evil heart, but by meeting a special person, he discovered justice.
''A knight whose horse travels faster than the wind. His battle-charge is a force to be reckoned with.''
Alpha, Beta, and Gamma meld as one to form a powerful monster.
A monster so heavy that each step rocks the earth.
An axe-swinging beast-warrior with the head of a dragon.
An indestructible mechanoid created for the sole purpose of guarding the gateways.

This monster moves so fast that it looks like an illusion to mortal eyes.


(This card is always treated as a "Phantom Beast" card.)
Elf twins that alternate their attacks.
A massive flea that feeds on the blood of its enemies.
A sea-dwelling snake that attacks passing enemies with its sharp teeth.
A giant warrior made of stone. A punch from this creature has earth-shaking results.
A crimson-shelled tortoise that feeds on flames.
In order to fight tremendous evil, he gained formidable power through body reconstruction, but lost his heart and his redemption.
An iron wolf with razor-sharp fangs that can penetrate any armor.
He has a tranquil soul, but carries a destiny that one day his heart shall be tainted by evil....
Despite its small size, this monster has powerful jaws that can rip metal to shreds.
A Goblin who devotes himself to mastering perfect calligraphy of the word "False". He gives his all to each stroke.
His soul long-since collapsed, his body recklessly continues onward, driven by a lust for more power. He no longer resembles his former self....
A large, spherical roach that attacks its enemies by rolling over them.
A high-performance jet fighter with power capsules for variable attack capabilities.
A masked monster that wields the most deadly of curses.
A very violent beast, it is always berserk. People say that they have never seen it silent.
A giant white shark with razor-sharp teeth.
This youthful king of the forests lives in a green world, abundant with trees and wildlife.
A surface battle robot that was once used for sea warfare.
A monster that guards the entrance to the Netherworld.
A robot guard built to protect throne rooms, it is armed with homing missiles.
This fairy uses her mystical power to protect the weak and provide spiritual support.
An earthen figure that protects the tomb of an ancient ruler.
A living suit of armor that attacks enemies with a bone-jarring tackle.
A Harpie chick who aspires to flit about beautifully and gorgeously, but attack sharply.
This human-shaped animal with wings is beautiful to watch but deadly in battle.
A haunted spirit of a falsely accused knight who wanders in search of truth and justice.
A massive beetle with a tough carapace and a dangerous horn.
Confuses enemy monsters with a noise that is harsh to the ears.
A very agile half-fish warrior known for its relentless attacks.
An intensely hot flame creature that rams anything standing in its way.
A one-eyed behemoth with thick, powerful arms made for delivering punishing blows.
This slime apparently has some human genes in its genetic makeup.
This monster feeds on whatever it catches in its web.
This amphibian is strong on the attack, but leaves much to be desired when defending.
A dragon created from a massive diamond that sparkles with blinding light.
Manipulates enemy attacks with the power of illusion.
A log that attacks lost travelers in the forest. Originally a big tree, it was cut down and possessed by a wicked spirit.
Of all Insect fighters, he is the paragon of the Indestructible Insect Invaders, which only the elite of the elite can join. We can no longer ignore their unmatched battle prowess.
A huge turtle that is often mistaken for an island.
A strong master swordsman. His loyalty is to justice, his duty to protect the weak.
An almost invisible, semi-transparent jellyfish that drifts in the sea.
Jerry, a bean soldier, believes he is the strongest warrior in the world, but his true abilities are still untested.
This club-wielding warrior battles to the end and will never surrender.
A huge monster in the shape of a hippopotamus. The sneezing from his gigantic body is so fierce that people mistake it for a hurricane.
Serving as a double for the Ruler of the Blue Flame, he's a master swordsman that wields a fine blade.
A huge bee with exceptional strength that's particularly dangerous in a swarm.
A fiend that dwells in a blinding curtain of smoke.
Wields the power of darkness to destroy its enemies.
A man-hunter with powerful arms that can crush boulders.
A vicious, fire-breathing dragon whose wicked flame corrupts the souls of its victims.
A workaholic fiend who devotes everything to his research into the languages of Dark World. His mind has collapsed because of working too hard.
A massive, intelligent spider that traps enemies with webbing.
A vicious bird that attacks from the skies with its whip-like tail.
A very vicious stag beetle that goes for the head.
A genie of the lamp that is at the beck and call of its master.
These walls form a labyrinth with no exit for enemies.
Soothes the souls of others by chanting a mysterious spell.
A fast-moving, bird-like creature that strangles opposing monsters with its long, thin arms.
A mechanical spider with rocket launchers capable of random fire.
A forbidden left arm sealed by magic. Whosoever breaks this seal will know infinite power.
A forbidden left leg sealed by magic. Whosoever breaks this seal will know infinite power.
Huge monster with a lion's mane similar to the King of Beasts.
A minor dragon incapable of breathing fire.
This massive eel generates huge charges of electricity and unleashes them as thunderbolts.
A liquid life form that thrives on water.
A beast soldier derived from dragons, it is small for a Dragon-Type. Moving very quickly, this monster is an excellent strategist.
This spirit emerges from the mystic lamp and obeys the wishes of its summoner.
A very beautiful dragon covered with sapphire. It does not like fights, but has incredibly high attack power.
This dragon feeds on emerald. Enchanted by this monster even when attacked, few people live to tell of its beauty.
Specializing in combination attacks, this warrior uses magnetism to block an enemy's escape.
Specializing in combination attacks, this warrior is equipped with a tough, magnetically coated armor.
He used to be a normal dog who played around in a park, but was corrupted by the powers of darkness.
A gourmet food renowned by the Dark World upper crust. It has sensational flavor.
This creature casts a spell of terror and confusion just before attacking its enemies.
A sorcerer blessed by lunar light with powers far beyond mortal comprehension.
A mammoth that protects the graves of its pack and is absolutely merciless when facing grave-robbers.
Man-eating plant with poison feelers for attacking enemies.
A monster disguised as a treasure chest that is known to attack the unwary adventurer.
Legendary swordmaster Masaki is a veteran of over 100 battles.
A deadly duo consisting of a beast master and its loyal servant.
A wandering Kyonshee searching for a strong rival to defeat. They say he was known as the master of all martial arts.
A cyborg snail that still travels at a slow pace.
A hunter that relentlessly pursues its target by order of the Machine King.
An eyeball fiend created by a servant of the wicked, it uses "Dark Blasts" to blow away its enemies.
Rolls along the ground releasing bolts of electricity to attack its enemies.
Made of mysterious metal, this monster is a doomsday machine from the edge of the universe.
This monster has four different masks for four different attacks.
A gigantic insect-like creature covered by thick armor. Everything in his path is destroyed.
A metal fish with a razor-sharp caudal fin.
A fiend guarding the treasures of the netherworld, it's most at home in the dark.
This dragon appeared from the sky and crashed to the earth.
A machine soldier that was developed as a guard. It is made of rust-proof metal.
A dragon warrior of the moon armed with a crescent sword.
For nearly a millennium, this golem has served as guardian of an ancient treasure trove.
A famous shield said to belong to an ancient Egyptian Pharaoh. Legends tell of its power to block any strong attack.
A missile-launching fish protected by deadly spikes.
An outcast angel. Nobody knows what he is thinking at all. Sometimes he gets mad and that is dreadful.
A giant born from magma, it attacks with a magma punch.
A warrior hidden within an egg that attacks enemies by flinging eggshells.
Many have fallen victim to this lunar warrior's crescent pike.
A strange fiend with long arms and razor-sharp talons.
This seemingly mild-mannered creature has an extremely volatile temper.
Nothing can stop the mad attack of this powerful creature.
Half man and half horse, this monster is known for its extreme speed.
A delicate elf that lacks offense, but has a terrific defense backed by mystical power.
A monstrous sheep with a long tail for hypnotizing enemies.
A soul of light covered by mystical shine. When you see its beautiful shape, your dream will come true.
The one-eyed Necrolancer launches his onslaught from a dimensional ring that can appear out of thin air.
A pussycat-fairy. Contrary to her lovely beauty, she claws on her enemies.
A fast and lethal creature with very dangerous claws.
A child-like creature that controls a sleep fiend to beckon enemies into eternal slumber.
The true nature of this wizard, who rules all water. It defends itself with a vast, impenetrable wall of ice.
A huge bug-like monster said to come from another planet. It gathers in swarms.
A dimensional drifter who not only practices sorcery, but is also a sword and martial arts master.
A Ninja dog who has mastered extreme Ninjutsu. Through hard training, it learned the technique to metamorphose into a human being.
Swallows enemies whole and uses their essence as energy.
With the head of a fish and the legs of an octopus, this strange creature attacks enemies by flinging spears.
Frightening in appearance, this creature uses its large eyes and ears to keep track of any movement.
An ogre possessed by the powers of the dark. Few can withstand its rapid charge.
He's one of the Ojama Trio. It's said that he butts in by any means necessary. It's also said that when the three are together, something happens.
He's one of the Ojama Trio. It's said that he butts in by any means necessary. It's also said that when the three are together, something happens.
He's one of the Ojama Trio. It's said that he butts in by any means necessary. It's also said that when the three are together, something happens.
This dragon wears a shield not only for its own protection, but also for ramming its enemies.
An armored tank possessed by a fiend that will pursue enemies until they're crushed.
They are oppressed, but believe they will have their freedom someday.
A one-eyed giant that serves the "Dark Ruler Ha Des", it skewers its enemies with its sharp horn, shattering them to pieces.
A strange warrior from another dimension.
An all-terrain armored vehicle armed with a heavy-duty machine gun.
With skin tinged a bluish-white, this strange creature is a fearsome sight to behold.
A dragon from the cartoons that's more dangerous than it appears to be.
A large peacock that launches its feathers in a lethal attack.
Although they always suffer in silence, they swear an oath to inevitably revolt.
A quick-moving and tiny fairy that's very difficult to hit.
A very small dragon known for its vicious attacks.
This small but deadly creature is better off avoided.
An apparition of those said to formerly serve the Pharaoh. It has tremendous loyalty that does not waiver.
The mummy of a soldier that has been guarding the royal family for thousands of years. Even now, its spirit does not allow anybody to trespass.
This creature is shielded with a tough hide of hair and is excellent at defending itself.
This crystalline monster focuses light to create a lethal laser.
While the king is away, this queen protects his throne with a mighty defense.
An amphibian with a myriad of powers to shield it from enemy attacks.
This monster attacks enemies using its huge beak.
Queen of the Emerald Forest and wife of the Spirit King, she lives surrounded by vivid red leaves.
This knight catches her opponents off guard, dominating them with swift yet graceful attacks.
The Sun and the North Wind join hands to deliver a devastating combination of heat and gale-force winds.
A mermaid archer that hides in a protective shell, waiting for the right moment to strike.
''A ferocious dragon with a deadly attack.''
A forbidden right arm sealed by magic. Whosoever breaks this seal will know infinite power.
A forbidden right leg sealed by magic. Whosoever breaks this seal will know infinite power.
A warrior fully covered with metal. It upgrades by fusing with "Roboyarou".
The Commander of Machine-Types, he serves the Machine King. He is famous for the way he controls his troops.
A warrior fully covered with metal. It upgrades by fusing with "Robolady".
Protected by a solid body of rock, this monster throws a bone-shattering punch.
A deadly doll gifted with mystical power, it is particularly powerful when attacking against dark forces.
An amphibian capable of calling up a massive tidal wave from the dark seas to wipe out enemy monsters.
With an axe in each hand, this monster delivers heavy damage.
A very elusive creature that looks like a harmless statue until it attacks.
A gargoyle enhanced by the powers of darkness. Very sharp talons make it a worthy opponent.
A vicious little dragon sheltered in an egg that looks deceptively harmless.
This normally gentle dinosaur enjoys relaxing in its nest in the prairies. If it becomes angered, it turns terribly ferocious.
This clown appears from nowhere and executes very strange moves to avoid enemy attacks.
Appears from underground and attacks with long, snake-like tentacles.
Soldiers equipped with state-of-the-art weaponry to face unknown creatures.
A warrior who defends the world of the Sea of Darkness. He prides himself on his fighting prowess both on the ground and, of course, in the water.
One of the few people who has a good command of Talismans. His history is a mystery.
This wizard worships the darkness, and is served by a sinister hand that drags its enemies into oblivion.
A mystical dragon that burns away the unworthy with its mystic flames.
A dragon created from the soul of a wicked knight.
A bow tie with horrible power, it attacks an opponent by controlling others.
This monster employs the powers of both Light and Darkness.
The peacemaker among monsters.
A snow wolf that's beautiful to the eye, but absolutely vicious in battle.
A lost dog that wandered off 1000 years ago. He's still waiting for his master to come for him.
A pirate ship that appears out of the mist and sinks any seagoing vessels.
This monster swoops down and attacks with a rain of knives stored in its wings.
A skeletal ghost that isn't strong but can mean trouble in large numbers.
A flying dragon with four wings housing some very dangerous blades.
With eyes like a hawk and a flying speed exceeding Mach 5, this monster is a master of the sky.
A ferocious animal that sleeps all day. Sometimes it's better to let Sleeping Lions lie.
A slime with the head of a frog, it attacks by croaking terribly.
The machine's ability is said to vary according to its slot results.
Apparently totally unreliable, he wonders if he has incredible potential.
A duck which can walk at a sonic speed. Sometimes, he cannot deal with his incredible pace and loses control.
A maiden that uses sound to her advantage, she wields a scythe that's shaped like a musical note.
A slave of the dark arts, this sorcerer is a master of life-extinguishing spells.
The soul of a tiger that is said to devour human souls. He is a famous soul that you wouldn't want to run into in a dark alley.
A living wonder of mystery.
A wicked spirit created by the hateful souls of those who fell in battle. It grows by assimilating the souls of its enemies.
A Space Mambo floating in the vast universe. This living relic was found in the ruins of a super civilization on Alphard 4.
Many have been deceived by the beauty of this vampire.
Using the spikes sprouting from its body, this creature stabs its opponents and floods them with electricity.
A mechanical soldier created by a wicked sorcerer, it attacks with the two steel balls attached to its arms.
This wise spirit dwells in books, using its accumulated knowledge to defeat enemies.
A spirit that soothes the soul with the music of its heavenly harp.
A steel idol worshipped in the Land of Machines.
A mechanized iron doll with tremendous strength.
A dragon formed by huge boulders that are also used to attack the enemy.
A behemoth shaped by giant boulders.
It may look like a harmless stuffed animal, but its zipper mouth deals a deadly bite.
A warrior wizard adept in casting bone-chilling spells.

A fiend with dark powers for confusing the enemy. Among the Fiend-Type monsters, this monster boasts considerable force.

(This card is always treated as an "Archfiend" card.)
An amateur with a sword, this fairy warrior relies on its mysterious powers.
A monster formed by the vengeful souls of those who passed away in battle.
A member of a race of sea serpents that freely travels through the sea.
This bird is known far and wide as a harbinger of doom.
A mysterious temple of skulls and bones that pulls in unsuspecting enemies.
Known as a swamp dweller, this creature is a minion of the dark forces.
A feared salmon, master of the Sea of Darkness. Its roe is the best delicacy in the World of Darkness.
A zombie that suddenly appeared from plot #13 - an empty grave.
A proud ruler of the jungle that some fear and others respect.
A huge dragon dwelling in a cave. It is horrible when it gets angry, although it is usually quiet. It is said to preserve certain treasures.
This gentlemanly creature is extremely wicked, feared by man and fiend alike.
Grand King of the Seven Seas, he's able to summon massive tidal waves to drown the enemy.
This monster feeds on the dreams of an unwary sleeper, dragging the victim into eternal slumber.
Wearing odd fashions, this gentleman is very fickle. He sometimes saves people and at other times commits crimes.
An all-powerful hand that delivers ruthless attacks.
A portrait cursed by the artist, it is said to bring ill fortune to anyone who owns it.
A stone monument from Easter Island that launches laser blasts from its rock-hewn lips.
A wicked entity that controls the hearts of men, its thousand eyes are able to see and expand the negative influences in an individual's soul.
A three-headed nocturnal monster that is absolutely ruthless when fighting.
A pair of friendly skeletons, lean and fat, that travel with extreme difficulty.
This monster stores electricity within his body, and can unleash it with catastrophic power.
A fast and powerful axe-wielding beast-warrior.
This monster captures other fish with its long tongue and sucks the energy out of them.
An alligator monster straight from the cartoons.
A tiger-striped dragon that is often seen racing across the wasteland at tremendous speeds.
A guardian of the woods, this massive tree is believed to be immortal.
An unworthy dragon with three sharp horns sprouting from its head.
This fiend passes judgment on enemies that are locked in coffins.
This creature attacks with electromagnetic waves.
An unusual turtle that not only swims at tremendous speeds, but can also sail across the skies.
A tiger encased in a protective shell that attacks with razor-sharp fangs.
A strange, one-eyed monster that can fell an enemy with a single stab of its spear.
An amphibious creature with two whip-like tails.
Two dragons fused as one from the effects of the Big Bang.
A powerful monster whose two heads attack as one.
A dinosaur with two deadly jaws, it stores electricity in its horn and releases high voltage bolts from the mouth on its back.
Capable of firing cannonballs from its mouth for long-range attacks, this creature is particularly effective in mountain battles.
A crimson dragon that spits fireballs to create a blazing sea of fire.
The people that gather to swear to fight their oppressors. A revolution is coming.
The speed of this warrior creates an intense vacuum that can slice through a monster's hide.
Fast on its feet, this dinosaur rips enemies to shreds with its sharp claws.
A bull fiend restored by the dark arts, this monster appears out of a jar.
This ace fighter is unbeatable in a dogfight. It combines with other monsters to launch an array of encircling attacks.
This monster can call forth sudden torrents of battering rain.
This wicked Beast-Warrior does every horrid thing imaginable, and loves it! His axe bears the marks of his countless victims.
The warrior who can manipulate dragons. Nobody knows his mysterious past.
A wandering warrior who seeks the sanctuary where he can gain the power of the Archlords. To escape the temptation of evil fiends, he fights solo day by day.
This monster swamps an opponent with an almost endless supply of water.
Transforms the water overflowing from a jar into attacking dragons.
A creature that electrocutes opponents with bolts of lightning.
Attacks from the skies with a whip-like tail.
A dragon commonly found guarding mountain fortresses. Its signature attack is a sweeping dive from out of the blue.
This monster's wings are capable of generating tornadoes.
A six-winged fairy who prays for peace and hope.
Dressed in a night-black tuxedo, this creature presides over the darkness.
Once it has started battle, this monster attacks fiercely and cannot stop.
The new form of the enigmatic Inpachi, remodeled by cutting-edge Dark World technology. Maneuverability has been sacrificed for strong armor, which is considered more important.
Once this monster wraps itself around a victim, there is no escape.
A fish with arms, legs, and some very sharp teeth.
A harmless monster found lurking in just about any attic.
A monster with a mighty cannon barrel, it is able to integrate its attacks. It attacks in many ways by combining and separating with other monsters.
This monster has three fire-breathing heads and can form a sea of blazing flames.
A treasure box containing a monster that attacks any unwary bandit.
A monster whose full potential can be achieved when outfitted with "Metalmorph".
The name of this illustrious knight is known by all residents of Dark World. He never oppresses the commoners.
